channel.title: Dark Country Boy — Official Music Podcast
channel.description: Gravel-soaked dark country and swamp blues from North Carolina. New music regularly. 47K+ YouTube subscribers, 14M+ views, distributed on Spotify, Apple Music, and all major platforms.
channel.itunes:author: Dark Country Boy

image.title: Dark Country Boy — Official Music Podcast

item.title: Barbed-Wire Horizon (Dark Country Music)
item.description: Dark country and swamp blues from North Carolina. Stream on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/4TQMuCjeTbhqvPinWKqRAv
item.itunes:author: Dark Country Boy
